_comment: v2.7 - flat perimeters with golden-angle-distributed butt seams (the scarfed helix wall FAILED a print: on layer 0 it ramps the nozzle 0.2->0.4 mm over a flat bed, up to 2x under-extruded, and the outer perimeter lifted off). Spiral+caulk hoop from layer 0, variable-width radial spokes embedded 0.2 mm into both walls, band gap 0.3 mm kept and caulked.
